pages.summary: The website presents a clean and professional appearance with a good layout and clear information, though some text contrast issues and minor misalignments are present.

issues.description: The text 'HIKKADUWA SRI LANKA' and 'Fresh Seafood - Beach - Sunset views' in the hero section have low contrast against the background image, making them slightly difficult to read.
The text 'Key details for visitors and digital assistants' above the Quick Facts section is very small and has low contrast, making it hard to read.
The 'Cuisine' and 'Meals' labels in the Quick Facts section are slightly misaligned to the left compared to the content below them.
The text '25+ Years of Fresh Catches' and 'Ocean on Your Plate. Sand at Your Feet' are very small and have low contrast, making them hard to read.
The 'Connect' heading in the Quick Links section of the footer is misspelled as 'Connecct'.
